author: gorkycreator
description: Add and remove tags quickly. Tag search results, bulk tag, and add dedicated buttons/commands for your favorites!

manifest.author: Gorkycreator
manifest.description: Add and remove tags quickly. Tag search results, bulk tag, and add dedicated buttons/commands for your favorites!
manifest.name: Quick Tagger

name: Quick Tagger

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description:
Improvements:
- a list of tags with tag(s) that contain spaces are now broken into independent tags. This conforms the frontmatter to how the tags are interpreted by Obsidian (i.e. "the tag" is interpreted as `#the` and `#tag`, and thus Quick Tagger now breaks them into two different items when it processes a note).

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description: Small fixes based on feedback from [Quick Tagger's submission to the community plugins repo](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/2616).

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description:
Improvements:
- Updated manifest.json with more accurate information for community plugin submission

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description:
New Features:
- Add new tag from tag selection modal.
- Setting for selecting preferred casing when adding new tags.
- Added a command to toggle the most recently modified tag.

Improvements:
- Improved compatibility with [Tag Wrangler](https://github.com/pjeby/tag-wrangler) by conforming scenarios where `#myTag` exists in the Yaml header to `myTag`
- Context menu entry will now toggle starred tags when right-clicking on a single file.
- Reviewed and applied the recommended Obsidian styles in code and documentation.
- Added a few unit tests.

Bug Fixes:
- Updated dependencies that were flagged with vulnerabilities.

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description:
Bug Fixes:
- Updated manifest.json to work with [Obsidian BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat)

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description:
Breaking Changes (from v1.2.0):
- Settings have been redone, back up your list of priority tags and get ready for lots of clicking to put them back in.

New Features:
- configurable settings for Starred tags 🌠...
  - Add the tag to the top of the list when selecting tags
  - Add right-click option to add the starred tag
  - Add a clickable status bar button to toggle the starred tag on the active note
  - Add an Obsidian command to toggle the starred tag on the active note (make it a hotkey if you want ⌨️)

Improvements:
- Decoupling of the tag selection dialog and tag adding functions. Hooray for easier maintenance!

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description:
Breaking Changes
- Settings have been redone, back up your list of priority tags and get ready for lots of clicking to put them back in.

New Features
- Starred tags 🌠
    - This is a better way to manage the list of tags that is prioritized, and opens new opportunities for treating these tags differently on a granular level.
- Feedback in the status bar when processing large numbers of notes.

Improvements
- Warning dialogs are worded better.

Fixes
- Added handling for spaces after the closing "---" for the yaml header. Obsidian recognizes this, but the API doesn't handle it.
- Tags separated with only spaces (no commas) in the yaml header are now broken into individual tags rather than converted into a single giant tag (this also made for an invalid tag due to the inclusion of spaces).
- No longer count folders and non-markdown files in the totals when bulk tagging; these are now skipped.

This is currently a preview release because settings were exposed for starred tag features that don't exist yet. This doesn't affect the functionality of existing features, there are just a couple of setting toggles that don't affect the behavior of the app yet.
releases.name: 2.0.0 alpha

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description:
New Features
- File context menu entry to tag and remove tags
- Search context menu entry to add and remove tags

Improvements
- Refactored to utilize Obsidian's `processFrontMatter` utility rather than taking the whole note content and manually parsing the frontmatter

Fixes
- Now absorbs `Tag`, `Tags`, and `tag`, into a `tags` key

releases.author: Gorkycreator
releases.description:
New Features
- Confirmation dialog for deleting all tags

Fixes
- Now absorbs existing `tag` frontmatter data into the `tags` key
